languages.text: "Акриэль Калукс со своими соратниками, представитель Черного Легиона и участник конфликта, названный Готической войной. Одержимые космодесантники Хаоса в этом регионе — редкость сама по себе, тем более — причастные к историческому конфликту примитивных цивилизаций".

traits.locale_text: "Акриэль Калукс со своими соратниками, представитель Черного Легиона и участник конфликта, названный Готической войной. Одержимые космодесантники Хаоса в этом регионе — редкость сама по себе, тем более — причастные к историческому конфликту примитивных цивилизаций".

languages.text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."
languages.original_text: "Акриэль Калукс со своими соратниками, представитель Черного Легиона и участник конфликта, названный Готической войной. Одержимые космодесантники Хаоса в этом регионе — редкость сама по себе, тем более — причастные к историческому конфликту примитивных цивилизаций".

traits.locale_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

"Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

"Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

languages.text: “阿克里尔·卡鲁克斯和他的同伴，黑色军团的代表人物，参与过一场名为哥特战争的冲突。在此区域，被附身的异端阿斯塔特本身就很罕见，更不必说他们还参与过原始文明之间的历史性冲突。”
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: “阿克里尔·卡鲁克斯和他的同伴，黑色军团的代表人物，参与过一场名为哥特战争的冲突。在此区域，被附身的异端阿斯塔特本身就很罕见，更不必说他们还参与过原始文明之间的历史性冲突。”

languages.text: « Akriel Kalux et ses compagnons, membres de la Black Legion ayant participé à un conflit qu'on surnomme la Guerre Gothique. Les Astartes hérétiques possédés sont déjà rares en soi dans cette région, je vous laisse donc imaginer la difficulté d'en trouver ayant été impliqués dans un conflit historique entre civilisations primitives. »
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: « Akriel Kalux et ses compagnons, membres de la Black Legion ayant participé à un conflit qu'on surnomme la Guerre Gothique. Les Astartes hérétiques possédés sont déjà rares en soi dans cette région, je vous laisse donc imaginer la difficulté d'en trouver ayant été impliqués dans un conflit historique entre civilisations primitives. »

languages.text: «Akriel Kalux y sus acompañantes, representante de la Legión Negra y participante en la Guerra Gótica. Es difícil encontrar Astartes herejes poseídos en general, y este, además, estuvo involucrado en un conflicto histórico entre civilizaciones primitivas».
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: «Akriel Kalux y sus acompañantes, representante de la Legión Negra y participante en la Guerra Gótica. Es difícil encontrar Astartes herejes poseídos en general, y este, además, estuvo involucrado en un conflicto histórico entre civilizaciones primitivas».

languages.text: "Kara Lejyon'un bir temsilcisi ve Gotik Savaşı adlı çatışmanın katılımcısı olan Akriel Kalux ve yoldaşları. İlkel medeniyetler arasındaki tarihî bir çatışmaya dâhil olanları geçtim, bu bölgede ele geçirilmiş kâfir Astartes mensupları bizzat başlı başına nadir eserlerdir."
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: "Kara Lejyon'un bir temsilcisi ve Gotik Savaşı adlı çatışmanın katılımcısı olan Akriel Kalux ve yoldaşları. İlkel medeniyetler arasındaki tarihî bir çatışmaya dâhil olanları geçtim, bu bölgede ele geçirilmiş kâfir Astartes mensupları bizzat başlı başına nadir eserlerdir."

languages.text: "Akriel Kalux und seine Gefährten, Vertreter der Black Legion und Teilnehmer eines als Gothic-Krieg bekannten Konfliktes. Besessene ketzerische Astartes sind in dieser Region für sich schon eine Seltenheit, vor allem, wenn sie an einem historischen Konflikt zwischen primitiven Zivilisationen beteiligt waren."
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: "Akriel Kalux und seine Gefährten, Vertreter der Black Legion und Teilnehmer eines als Gothic-Krieg bekannten Konfliktes. Besessene ketzerische Astartes sind in dieser Region für sich schon eine Seltenheit, vor allem, wenn sie an einem historischen Konflikt zwischen primitiven Zivilisationen beteiligt waren."

languages.text: 「アクリエル・カルークスと彼の仲間たちは、黒の軍団を代表し、ゴシック戦争と呼ばれる紛争に参加した者たち。この地域に異端のアスターテスがいるのは珍しいことだが、原始的な文明の間の古くからの紛争に関わった者たちとなると、なおさらである。」
languages.original_text: "Akriel Kalux and his companions, representative of the Black Legion and participant in a conflict called the Gothic War. Possessed heretic Astartes in this region are a rarity in and of themselves, let alone ones involved in a historic conflict between primitive civilisations."

traits.locale_text: 「アクリエル・カルークスと彼の仲間たちは、黒の軍団を代表し、ゴシック戦争と呼ばれる紛争に参加した者たち。この地域に異端のアスターテスがいるのは珍しいことだが、原始的な文明の間の古くからの紛争に関わった者たちとなると、なおさらである。」
